dataset.title: GBIF Occurrence Download 0024942-260208012135463
dataset.abstract: A dataset containing all occurrences available in GBIF matching the query: { "and" : [ "BasisOfRecord is one of (Human Observation, Living Specimen)", "Country is Colombia", "GadmGid is COL.8_2", "MediaType is Image", "OccurrenceStatus is Present" ] } The dataset includes records from the following constituent datasets. The full metadata for each constituent is also included in this archive: 450 records from Observation.org, Nature data from around the World 68 records from Xeno-canto - Soundscapes from around the world 3 records from Xeno-canto - Orthoptera sounds from around the world 4 records from eButterfly Surveys 240 records from NABU|naturgucker 2037 records from Xeno-canto - Bird sounds from around the world 1 records from Earth Guardians Weekly Feed 21476 records from iNaturalist Research-grade Observations 191 records from Pl@ntNet observations 2 records from Xeno-canto - Anura sounds from around the world
